items.title: Conte loopt leeg na zware blessure aanvoerder: 'Dit is zelfmoord'
items.summary: Napoli heeft een moeilijke week zaterdagavond afgesloten met een overwinning op Fiorentina. De zorgen van Antonio Conte zijn echter nog niet voorbij, want aanvoerder Giovanni Di Lorenzo verliet het veld per brancard en heeft waarschijnlijk zijn voorste kruisband afgescheurd. Conte was na afloop dan ook woedend.

items.title: VI Live: Liverpool draait het razendsnel om via geweldige Ekitiké
items.summary: Welkom in de VI Live van zaterdag 31 januari. Er staan drie duels in de Eredivisie op het programma, Liverpool krijgt bezoek van Newcastle United en de regerend kampioenen van Spanje, Duitsland en Italië komen in actie. Volg alle hoogtepunten in de VI Live.

items.title: Rosenior hails 'world class' Fernandez in Chelsea comeback
items.summary: Liam Rosenior is full of praise for Chelsea's second-half comeback win against West Ham, singling out matchwinner Enzo Fernandez's performance.

items.title: Kompany beklaagt zich na nieuwe uitglijder Bayern over arbitrage
items.summary: Bayern München-trainer Vincent Kompany toonde zich na het gelijkspel tegen Hamburger SV allesbehalve gelukkig over de rol van de arbitrage in het Volksparkstadion. Scheidsrechter Harm Osmers en zijn assistenten konden weinig goed doen bij de Belgische coach.

items.title: Rosenior: I hope hiring me is Chelsea's greatest decision
items.summary: Chelsea boss Liam Rosenior says fans were right to boo at the end of the first half against West Ham, but hopes that hiring him becomes 'the best decision' the club has ever made.

items.title: 0-2 at HT, 3-2 at FT! Chelsea in epic comeback win...
items.summary: Chelsea came from two goals down to seal a remarkable 3-2 victory over relegation-threatened West Ham United on Saturday.

items.title: Arsenal thrash Leeds to reinstate 7-point PL lead
items.summary: Arsenal have reinstated their seven-point lead at the top of the Premier League after a 4-0 win against Leeds United.

items.title: Snoop Dogg wants to make Swansea 'global name'
items.summary: Swansea City investor Snoop Dogg has said he wants to take the side back to the Premier League, and establish them as a 'global name'.

items.title: Messi, CR7 jerseys headline Terry's $695K auction
items.summary: Former England and Chelsea captain John Terry netted $695,000 from a 50-item auction of his personal collection, headlined by match-worn Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo jerseys.

items.title: Wrexham boost PL promotion hopes with 1-0 win
items.summary: Wrexham moved back into the Championship play-off places after their hard- fought 1-0 win over Sheffield Wednesday at Hillsborough.

items.title: Rosenior legde met donderspeech alles in handen van zijn spelers voor comeback
items.summary: Er zijn stevige woorden gevallen in de rust van de Premier League-wedstrijd Chelsea - West Ham United. De thuisploeg kwam met een 0-2 achterstand de kleedkamer in, maar draaide het volledig om in de tweede helft .

items.title: Likened to Mbappe - teenager Kroupi flourishing at Bournemouth
items.summary: Eli Junior Kroupi's stunning goal for Bournemouth against Wolves will help soften the blow of losing Antoine Semenyo to Manchester City.

items.title: Enzo Fernández seals thrilling Chelsea fightback to shatter 10-man West Ham
items.summary: There are times when trying to make sense of Chelsea is a futile task. Lurching between extremes is their speciality. They were shambolic against struggling West Ham for 45 minutes, had Stamford Bridge ready to turn on Liam Rosenior at half-time and still found a way to mount a comeback so wild it left their opponents in a state of utter, uncontrollable rage at the end of an incomprehensible London derby. Where to begin? With the end, perhaps, and Enzo Fernández running on to a cutback from João Pedro to make it 3-2 to Chelsea in the 92nd minute. It was some turnaround. João Pedro had made the difference after coming on at the start of the second half. The forward scored Chelsea’s first, heading home just before the hour, and was cool when he broke into the West Ham area when the game ran into added time. João Pedro had options. He could have shot and he could have crossed. Instead he threw West Ham by pulling the ball back to Fernández, who is beginning to resemble Frank Lampard with his knack of deciding games with late unnoticed runs from midfield. Continue reading...

items.title: Arsenal showed character and quality in win at Leeds - Arteta

items.title: Iraola hails 'incredible' goalscoring teenager Kroupi
items.summary: Bournemouth manager Andoni Iraola credits much of his side's recent improvment to "incredible" performances of Eli Junior Kroupi, as well as the depth brought in by new signings.
